subtopics.title: Revision for BECE Civic Education
common_misconceptions: Civic education is only about voting
Human rights mean you can do anything
subtopics.teaching_note: Key topics for BECE: National values (honesty, integrity, hard work), Citizenship (types, duties, rights), Human rights (right to life, education, freedom of speech), Responsibilities (obeying laws, paying taxes, voting), Democracy (features, importance), Rule of law (nobody is above the law), Nationalism (love for country, promoting national interest). Nigerian national symbols: flag (green-white-green), coat of arms, national anthem ('Arise, O Compatriots').
